ddls:
CREATE TABLE "production_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the production line */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the production line */,
  "production_type" TEXT /* Type of production (e.g., assembly, machining) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the production line (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the production line */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the production line */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the production line was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the production line */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the production line was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, pressure) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor on the production line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the sensor */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the sensor was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the sensor */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the sensor was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_systems" (
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control system */,
  "control_name" TEXT /* Name of the control system */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of control system (e.g., PLC, DCS) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the control system on the production line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the control system */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the control system */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the control system */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the control system */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the control system was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the control system */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the control system was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "pv" REAL /* Process variable (PV) value */,
  "op" REAL /* Operator setting (OP) value */,
  "sp" REAL /* Setpoint (SP) value */,
  "ts" REAL /* Time interval (ts) for the data point */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production line */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor */,
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the control system */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., temperature, pressure) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., good, bad) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_data_control_id FOREIGN KEY ("control_id") REFERENCES control_systems ("control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_data_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES production_lines ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_control" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_control_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES process_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high temperature, low pressure) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "dismissed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who dismissed the alert */,
  "dismissed_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was dismissed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES process_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, operator, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the user */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from where the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES process_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production line */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor (if applicable) */,
  "control_id" INTEGER /* ID of the control system (if applicable) */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date and time of the maintenance */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date and time of the maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "verified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who verified the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_control_id FOREIGN KEY ("control_id") REFERENCES control_systems ("control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES production_lines ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table that was modified */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was modified */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)
